title: (YTPMV) Chaos Luigi
description:
This video is a collaboration between Trogdorbad (audio) and myself (visuals).
Please be sure to check out his channel and Twitter here:
https://www.youtube.com/@Trogdorbad
https://twitter.com/BartDecider

I literally just finished playing Deltarune within days of Trogdorbad reaching out to me about collabing, so this couldn't have happened at a better time lmao. Despite the second half of this year being kind of a mess for me, I had a lot of fun making this for his amazing audio. I love this song and I still love the old Mama Luigi sources. See ya next year.

Song: Toby Fox - Chaos King (Deltarune)

All visuals and audio were done in Vegas Pro.

And if you want more Mama Luigi collab vids, check this:
https://youtu.be/eW_2aRWiVpI

Twitter: https://twitter.com/DeDoubleYouEl 
Alt Account: http://www.youtube.com/DeDoubleYouEl

#YTPMV #Deltarune #MamaLuigi
